## Charts

### Average Persuasion Strength by Model

Mean signed shift by persuader model across all cells.

![Average Persuasion Strength by Model](charts/persuader_effectiveness_overall.png)

### Adjusted Persuasion Strength by Model

Persuader residual performance after controlling for target and topic-side difficulty.

![Adjusted Persuasion Strength by Model](charts/persuader_effectiveness_adjusted.png)

### Target Susceptibility to Persuasion by Model

Mean signed shift experienced by each target model.

![Target Susceptibility to Persuasion by Model](charts/target_susceptibility_overall.png)

### Adjusted Target Susceptibility by Model

Target residual susceptibility after controlling for persuader and topic-side difficulty.

![Adjusted Target Susceptibility by Model](charts/target_susceptibility_adjusted.png)

### Persuasion Strength vs Target Resistance

Each point is one model: right means stronger as persuader, higher on the chart means harder to move as a target.

![Persuasion Strength vs Target Resistance](charts/persuasion_strength_vs_target_resistance.png)

### Average Persuasion Shift by Topic

Mean signed shift for each topic, split by PRO and CON persuasion assignments.

![Average Persuasion Shift by Topic](charts/shift_by_topic_side.png)

### Pairwise Matrix

Mean signed shift for each persuader-target direction in the no-notes condition.

![Pairwise Matrix](charts/pairwise_matrix_no_notes.png)

### Probe High-Variance Rate by Target

Pre/post probe high-variance rates for each target model.

![Probe High-Variance Rate by Target](charts/measurement_stability_by_target.png)
